name: io.github.WillHeadlee/lgl-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Little Green Light CRM. Search donors, log gifts, manage groups and contacts.

environmentVariables.name: LGL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Little Green Light API key (Settings → Integration → API Keys)

environmentVariables.name: LGL_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to refuse all create/update/delete tool calls and hide mutation tools from tools/list. Useful when pointing the server at a live donor database from an exploratory session.

environmentVariables.name: LGL_INTEGRATION_LISTENER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Listener URL for an LGL custom integration (Settings → Integrations in LGL). Enables submit_constituent_for_review, which posts to LGL's Integration Queue for human approval instead of writing directly — stays available even when LGL_READ_ONLY is set.
